name: Redis Enterprise - Shard Dashboard
description: New Relic implementation of the validated Redis Enterprise shard operations dashboard.

rawConfiguration.text:
# Redis Enterprise Shard Dashboard

New Relic implementation of the validated Redis Enterprise shard operations dashboard. Filter by `cluster`, `db`, and `redis`.

nrqlQueries.query: FROM (FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_used_memory) / 1024 / 1024 / 1024 AS value WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) FACET redis, node, role LIMIT MAX) SELECT max(value) AS 'used memory GiB' SINCE 2 minutes ago

FROM (FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_db_keys) AS value WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) FACET redis, node, role LIMIT MAX) SELECT max(value) AS 'keys' SINCE 2 minutes ago

FROM (FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_connected_clients) AS value WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) FACET redis, node, role LIMIT MAX) SELECT max(value) AS 'connections' SINCE 2 minutes ago
FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_up) AS 'up' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) FACET node, role LIMIT MAX SINCE 2 minutes ago
FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_up) AS 'up' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) FACET slots LIMIT MAX SINCE 2 minutes ago
FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_used_memory) AS 'used memory' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_maxmemory) AS 'maxmemory' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_max_process_mem) AS 'max process mem' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_current_cow_size) AS 'current cow size' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute

FROM Metric SELECT latest(namedprocess_namegroup_memory_bytes) AS 'resident memory' WHERE memtype = 'resident' AND cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute

FROM Metric SELECT (max(redis_server_total_commands_processed) - min(redis_server_total_commands_processed)) / 60 AS 'commands/sec' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) FACET redis TIMESERIES 1 minute

FROM Metric SELECT (max(redis_server_keyspace_read_hits) - min(redis_server_keyspace_read_hits)) / 60 AS 'read hits/sec' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) FACET redis TIMESERIES 1 minute

FROM Metric SELECT (max(redis_server_keyspace_read_misses) - min(redis_server_keyspace_read_misses)) / 60 AS 'read misses/sec' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) FACET redis TIMESERIES 1 minute

FROM Metric SELECT (max(redis_server_keyspace_write_hits) - min(redis_server_keyspace_write_hits)) / 60 AS 'write hits/sec' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) FACET redis TIMESERIES 1 minute

FROM Metric SELECT (max(redis_server_keyspace_write_misses) - min(redis_server_keyspace_write_misses)) / 60 AS 'write misses/sec' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) FACET redis TIMESERIES 1 minute

FROM Metric SELECT (max(redis_server_total_net_input_bytes) - min(redis_server_total_net_input_bytes)) / 60 AS 'net input' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) FACET redis TIMESERIES 1 minute

FROM Metric SELECT (max(redis_server_total_net_output_bytes) - min(redis_server_total_net_output_bytes)) / 60 AS 'net output' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) FACET redis TIMESERIES 1 minute

FROM Metric SELECT (max(redis_server_repl_touch_bytes) - min(redis_server_repl_touch_bytes)) / 60 AS 'repl touch' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) FACET redis TIMESERIES 1 minute

FROM Metric SELECT ((max(namedprocess_namegroup_cpu_seconds_total) - min(namedprocess_namegroup_cpu_seconds_total)) / 60) * 100 AS 'cpu %' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) FACET mode TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_db_keys) AS 'keys' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_db_expires) AS 'expiring keys' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_total_blocking_keys) AS 'blocking keys' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_total_blocking_keys_on_nokey) AS 'blocking keys on nokey' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_tracking_total_keys) AS 'tracking keys' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_tracking_total_prefixes) AS 'tracking prefixes' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_pubsub_patterns) AS 'pubsub patterns' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_pubsub_channels) AS 'pubsub channels' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_pubsubshard_channels) AS 'pubsub shard channels' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_total_watched_keys) AS 'watched keys' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_db_subexpiry) AS 'subexpiry' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute

FROM Metric SELECT (max(redis_server_expired_keys) - min(redis_server_expired_keys)) / 60 AS 'expired keys/sec' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute

FROM Metric SELECT (max(redis_server_evicted_keys) - min(redis_server_evicted_keys)) / 60 AS 'evicted keys/sec' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute

FROM Metric SELECT (max(redis_server_expired_subkeys) - min(redis_server_expired_subkeys)) / 60 AS 'expired subkeys/sec' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute

FROM Metric SELECT (max(redis_server_keys_trimmed) - min(redis_server_keys_trimmed)) / 60 AS 'keys trimmed/sec' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_db0_avg_ttl) AS 'avg ttl' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_connected_clients) AS 'connected clients' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_maxclients) AS 'max clients' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute

FROM Metric SELECT (max(redis_server_total_connections_received) - min(redis_server_total_connections_received)) / 60 AS 'connections received/sec' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_blocked_clients) AS 'blocked clients' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_tracking_clients) AS 'tracking clients' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_pubsub_clients) AS 'pubsub clients' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_watching_clients) AS 'watching clients' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute

FROM Metric SELECT (max(redis_server_keyspace_read_hits) - min(redis_server_keyspace_read_hits)) / 60 AS 'read hits/sec' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) FACET redis TIMESERIES 1 minute

FROM Metric SELECT (max(redis_server_keyspace_write_hits) - min(redis_server_keyspace_write_hits)) / 60 AS 'write hits/sec' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) FACET redis TIMESERIES 1 minute

FROM Metric SELECT (max(redis_server_keyspace_read_misses) - min(redis_server_keyspace_read_misses)) / 60 AS 'read misses/sec' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) FACET redis TIMESERIES 1 minute

FROM Metric SELECT (max(redis_server_keyspace_write_misses) - min(redis_server_keyspace_write_misses)) / 60 AS 'write misses/sec' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) FACET redis TIMESERIES 1 minute

FROM Metric SELECT (max(redis_server_lazyfreed_objects) - min(redis_server_lazyfreed_objects)) / 60 AS 'lazyfreed objects/sec' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) FACET redis TIMESERIES 1 minute

FROM Metric SELECT (max(redis_server_total_error_replies) - min(redis_server_total_error_replies)) / 60 AS 'error replies/sec' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) FACET redis TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_allocator_active) AS 'allocator active' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_allocator_allocated) AS 'allocator allocated' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_allocator_resident) AS 'allocator resident' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute

FROM Metric SELECT latest(namedprocess_namegroup_memory_bytes) AS 'resident process memory' WHERE memtype = 'resident' AND cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_mem_clients_slaves) AS 'slave clients mem' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_mem_clients_normal) AS 'normal clients mem' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_mem_aof_buffer) AS 'aof buffer' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_mem_replication_backlog) AS 'replication backlog' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_used_memory_scripts) AS 'scripts mem' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_mem_overhead_db_hashtable_rehashing) AS 'db rehash overhead' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_mem_fragmentation_ratio) AS 'fragmentation ratio' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_allocator_active) AS 'allocator active' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute
FROM Metric SELECT latest(redis_server_allocator_resident) AS 'allocator resident' WHERE cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute

FROM Metric SELECT latest(namedprocess_namegroup_memory_bytes) AS 'resident process memory' WHERE memtype = 'resident' AND cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) AND redis IN ({{redis}}) TIMESERIES 1 minute

nrqlQuery.query: FROM Metric SELECT uniques(cluster) WHERE metricName = 'redis_server_up' SINCE 30 minutes ago
FROM Metric SELECT uniques(db) WHERE metricName = 'redis_server_up' AND cluster IN ({{cluster}}) SINCE 30 minutes ago
FROM Metric SELECT uniques(redis) WHERE metricName = 'redis_server_up' AND cluster IN ({{cluster}}) AND db IN ({{db}}) SINCE 30 minutes ago
